prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约24096→23726→20749→22479，近年波动较大：2024年明显前移至20749名，2025年又后移至22479名，近两年累计后移约1730名；2025年基准约22479名；本省计划2022–2023年均为6人，2024年缩减至3人，2025年大幅增至12人；2026年计划14人，较2025年继续扩招约16.7%，扩招对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第131名（2026年），排名近年稳定在130名左右，属中后段211层次；抖音综合热度排名第72（评价一般），短视频曝光量中等；声誉文件中无新疆大学相关条目，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；该校在马克思主义理论、化学工程与技术等方向有一定学科基础。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机科学与技术（推荐）等工科专业社会热度较高；汉语言文学（推荐）热度平稳；化学属生化环材大类（明显劝退）。本省2026年考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；新疆大学位于乌鲁木齐市，属西部边疆地区，北京考生报考存在明显地域偏好差异；该校在北京招生计划较少（14人），地域因素对报考决策有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22479名、2026年扩招约16.7%（缓解竞争）、北京考生总数大幅增长约30%（加剧竞争）以及地域偏好等多项因素，叠加考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年最低位次约24927名，区间24427–25427名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings approximately 24096→23726→20749→22479, with significant fluctuations in recent years: in 2024 it clearly moved forward to 20749, and in 2025 it moved back to 22479, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1730 over the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 22479; the provincial plan was 6 students in both 2022 and 2023, reduced to 3 in 2024, and significantly increased to 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14 students, an increase of about 16.7% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; approximately ranked 131st on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with a stable ranking around 130 in recent years, belonging to the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities; comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 72 (average evaluation), with moderate short video exposure; no relevant entries for Xinjiang University in the reputation file, no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; the university has a certain disciplinary foundation in fields such as Marxist Theory and Chemical Engineering and Technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science and Technology (recommended) and other engineering majors have high social popularity; Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) has stable popularity; Chemistry belongs to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials category (clearly discouraged). The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, a western border region, and there are significant regional preference differences among Beijing examinees; the university's enrollment plan in Beijing is small (14 students), and regional factors have a certain inhibitory effect on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 22479, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 16.7% (alleviating competition), the significant increase of about 30% in the total number of Beijing examinees (intensifying competition), and regional preferences, along with the intensified competition effect from the surge in examinee numbers, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 24927, with a range of 24427–25427.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 24427–25427, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Computer Science and Technology, Chinese Language and Literature) as the main direction, with Tier 1 (Electrical Engineering and Automation) as a sprint option, and Tier 3 (Chemistry) as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation.
